summary: Frontend testing for THE LIONEYO order form updates. All key changes verified: HARSH20 referral code works, placeholder updated, field names correct, IIT note code confirmed in source (but no IIT product in DB to live-test). Console error found: fetchSiteSettings body stream already read.

integration_issues.issue: Console error: 'fetchSiteSettings error: TypeError: Failed to execute text on Response: body stream already read' — appears twice on page load. Settings still load from Supabase but this error indicates response body being consumed twice.

action_items: Fix fetchSiteSettings: response body stream being read twice (TypeError: body stream already read). Check if .json() and .text() are both called on same response object.
Add an IIT category product to Supabase to fully test the IIT note feature live (code logic is correct per code review)
critical_code_review_comments: fetchSiteSettings reads response body twice causing 'body stream already read' error — likely calling both response.text() and response.json() on same response
seed_data_creation: Only 1 product in DB: 'Oversize Tees' (STREETWEAR, ₹499, ACTIVE). IIT product missing from DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All order form changes verified: HARSH20 valid, placeholder correct, field names correct per code review. Only 1 product in Supabase (STREETWEAR). IIT note code is correct (data-testid='iit-custom-note', shows when product.category === 'iit') but untestable without IIT product in DB. Console error on site settings fetch to investigate.

test_results.1_homepage_loads: PASS - hero shows, IGNITE YOUR STYLE heading visible
test_results.4_referral_placeholder_HARSH20: PASS - placeholder is 'Enter promo code e.g. HARSH20'
test_results.5_HARSH20_valid: PASS - shows Valid! badge + 25% discount applied (total ₹424 for ₹499 product)
test_results.6_SHIVAM25_backward_compat: PASS - SHIVAM25 still shows Valid! badge
test_results.7_order_payload_field_names: PASS - code review confirms: full_name, phone, email, address, city, state, pincode, quantity, college_design_name, product_title, price, size, category, referral_code, final_total, payment_method
test_results.8_IIT_note_for_iit_products: PASS (code confirmed) - data-testid='iit-custom-note' present, shows for category==='iit' with WhatsApp and Instagram DM links. NOT testable live (no IIT product in DB)
test_results.9_no_IIT_note_for_streetwear: PASS - streetwear product modal does NOT show IIT note
test_results.11_payment_methods: PASS - UPI and COD buttons present
test_results.12_whatsapp_button: PASS - 'Order via WhatsApp' button present with data-testid='whatsapp-order-btn'
